name: Balthazar Valeriano-Soto
summary: Motivated Junior Web Developer with a strong foundation in modern frontend technologies and a passion for building responsive user interfaces. Eager to contribute to collaborative development teams while expanding expertise in full-stack architecture.

experience.title: Web Development Intern
experience.description: Assisted in the maintenance of client websites and implemented responsive design updates using CSS and JavaScript. Collaborated with senior developers to debug frontend issues and improve page load performance.

experience.title: Freelance Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed custom landing pages for local small businesses using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Managed client requirements and deployed sites via Netlify.

experience.title: IT Support Assistant
experience.description: Provided technical support for internal software tools and assisted in basic website content updates. Gained experience in version control systems and collaborative workflows.

education.degree: Higher Technician in Web Application Development
